blended.narrative: Timberline is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,943 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 40.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
